theme_and_archetype.vibe: Objective, rigid, authoritative, function-first, high data density. The dashboard must feel like a modern, hyper-fast Bloomberg terminal.

rules: Headings must use Manrope, avoid Inter.
All trading figures, prices, targets, and P&L MUST use IBM Plex Mono for vertical alignment.
Overlines/Labels must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Color is function: Only use Green/Red for financial direction. Keep 95% of text slate-900 or slate-500.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
layout_and_spacing.grid_classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tight and dense. Use p-4 for internal card padding.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-md (6px) max. Avoid pill shapes. Emphasize sharp, technical edges.
layout_and_spacing.alignment_rules: Left-align all text and forms. Right-align numeric columns in tables (Prices, P&L).

surfaces_and_themes.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-slate-200), NO shadows. On hover: border darkens slightly, no lift.
surfaces_and_themes.header: Solid white background, 1px border bottom. Must include brand name and system status.
surfaces_and_themes.panels: GRID BORDERS strategy. Expose the skeleton. Containers should feel like technical partitions.
surfaces_and_themes.glassmorphism: Avoid glassmorphism. It creates visual noise in data-heavy environments.

components.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Dense rows (py-2), right-aligned numbers. Use IBM Plex Mono for data cells.
components.badges: Use for LONG/SHORT signals. Square or rounded-sm. HIGH CONTRAST (bg-emerald-500 text-white for LONG, bg-red-500 text-white for SHORT).
components.charts: Recharts. Avoid unnecessary grids. Use stark 1px lines. Color code positive equity curve as emerald, negative as red.
components.buttons: Shadcn Button. Primary buttons are stark slate-900. Action buttons for trade execution should use primary unless destructive.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Select/Input for Alert Configuration. Left-aligned, tight spacing.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle background shifts (bg-slate-50) for table rows. Text color must remain high contrast.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use 'regular' or 'bold' weights. Avoid duotone to maintain the technical, high-contrast feel.

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, row actions). Use kebab-case, role-based (e.g., 'signal-long-button', 'backtest-run-button').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over Red/Green badges has sufficient contrast (use white text). Avoid grey-on-grey.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a high-density, production-grade trading dashboard. Do not use decorative gradients or soft shadows.
Color has extreme semantic meaning here. NEVER use Red or Green for decorative purposes. Red = Loss/Short/Bearish. Green = Profit/Long/Bullish.
Implement 'IBM Plex Mono' for ALL numeric data (prices, ratios, scores, P&L) so digits align perfectly vertically.
Follow 'The Control Room' grid: dense, fully utilized screen real-estate, tight gaps.
Use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons to maintain a crisp, technical look.
Ensure all major interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Since this is an Indian F&O system, consider UI components to cleanly display options data (e.g., Strike, CE/PE, OI, Volume) in a highly scannable table format.
